title: Vanilla But Better!
description: This is a modpack aimed to enhance the vanilla experience, each version of this pack adds 1 more mod than before
body:
This mod pack contains 70+ mods and will grow in size as i play through the hardcore experience on twitch.

This mods currently contains mods like
- Better Nether
- Better End
- Better archeology 
  and Cliff Under a Tree

with loads more mods being added later on, or soon
